MOTION / Ntc Of Mo & Mo To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. HEIDI LI, TEL. NO. 426-3567 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF WITH HER CLIENT MONICA DONG;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WAS PRESENTED TO THE COURT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MONICA DONG'S MOTION To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs - THE COURT GRANTED ATTORNEY'S FEE IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $5,000 AND $140.00 COST. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney Heidi Li present making a general appearance WITH Plaintiff Monica Dong.
No appearance by Defendant(s).

Court grants Plaintiff's request for continuance. Court makes no ruling today on the merits of Plaintiff's motion. PLAINTIFF MONICA DONG's MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS is continued to 11/18/14 at 9:30 a.m. Plaintiff must timely file a proof of service of a re-notice of hearing, and of the underlying moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: S. Kane; Not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT DAMIEN QUINN'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING AND SETTING ASIDE VOID DEFAULT.

APPEARANCES: Miho Kubota, Esq. of Law Offices of William P. Klein 693-9107 for pltf & opposing party (no compliance with the tentative ruling rule re giving notice to opposing party of their intent to appear at the hearing); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. Defendant declares he was never properly served and the entry of default can be set aside at any time. C.C.P. section 473(d). No declaration presented from process server. A general policy exists that cases can be heard on the merits. The request for attorney fees is denied. (Defendant/moving party to prepare order.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
